title: Marvell Technology Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Year-Over-Year
text: Marvell Technology reported fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings of 80 cents per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.3%. More specifically, this exceeded analysts' expectations of $0.71 by 12.68%, marking a beat. The company reported earnings of 60 cents per share a year ago. The stock experienced a massive 18.35% surge, fueled by a stellar Q4 earnings beat and a significant guidance raise that caught Wall Street off guard. The earnings call was broadly positive, with Marvell reporting record quarterly and annual revenue, strong margin expansion, substantial EPS growth, accelerated bookings, and an upgraded multi-year outlook driven primarily by the data center and interconnect businesses. Considering the continued robust demand for its data center and AI-driven products, Marvell Technology issued strong revenue guidance for the first quarter of fiscal 2027, expecting revenues to be $2.40 billion plus or minus 5%.
